# TECH59 Summit Vietnam 2026

> Vietnam's premier tech and startup summit connecting founders, investors, innovators, enterprises, and ecosystem leaders. 23–24 July 2026 at QTSC IT Park, Ho Chi Minh City.

TECH59 Summit 2026 brings together 2,000+ founders, investors, and innovators for two days of keynotes, networking, and deal-making at HCMC's largest tech park.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Event overview, agenda, audience, packages, venue, partners, and contact.

## Optional

- [Register](https://lu.ma/bde1n8vo): Get your pass via Luma.
